documentation.description:
This package allows a program to obtain the values of its arguments and the name that it was invoked with in
an encoding-aware way. It is assumed that the command name and the arguments are encoded in the encoding that
OS.OS_Encoding reports.

subprograms.name: Argument
subprograms.code: function Argument (Number : in Positive) return EAstring

documentation.description:
Returns the argument at position Number. If Number is outside the range 1..Argument_Count, then Constraint_Error
is propagated.
Returns the number of strings passed as arguments to the program.
Returns the name of the command that invoked the program.
